_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: PD-1 expression on intratumoral T cells, indicative of T cell activation, revealed that, on average, 70% and 61.2% of CD8+ and CD4+ T cells, respectively, expressed PD-1 on their surface
details: Successfully detected activated T cells with 70% of CD8+ T cells and 61.2% of CD4+ T cells expressing PD-1; positive correlation between PD-1 expression on CD4+ and CD8+ T cells (r=0.4945, p=0.0011)
